name: MAG-7 | 北冥有鱼
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted with a blue base and underwater creatures in the foreground. There's always a bigger, greener fish
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器使用蓝色底色以及水中生物作为主视觉。 总有大鱼吃小鱼
